subject: FWD: Hirsh Singh Emerges as Top Candidate with Highest Number of Signatures
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
Undeniable proof: The power of the PEOPLE. | | | Dear Friend,

Never underestimate the sheer POWER of the people. It's all about WE the people.

You see, that's the fatal mistake our elitist opponents repeat over and over again. They throw money at problems, as if _buying_ their power is the same as earning YOUR respect. **The proof is in the pudding**.

Once again, the people have spoken. Even as the powerful establishment shilled for **[one of the most corrupt RINO candidates in history](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=a2bce4ec41&e=3e017fab0f)** , patriots like you refused to take the bait.

## As a result, we recently got the _highest_ number of ballot petitions supporting our campaign — period. No other candidate even came close to the numbers we got.

Check out my team's victory press release below. And as always... **_thank you_**.

-Hirsh
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=1007ccc13b&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| April 4th, 2020
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)
---
| |
# Hirsh Singh Emerges as Top Candidate with Highest Number of Signatures

**Linwood, NJ** — Conservative U.S. Senate candidate Hirsh Singh has emerged victorious with the greatest number of signatures backing his candidacy, outstripping all other campaigns. Figures published by the New Jersey Secretary of State revealed that Singh was the only Republican U.S. Senate candidate with over two thousand verified signatures.

In a brief statement, Singh described this achievement as a “show of massive grassroots support,” pointing out that his campaign did not pay any professional firm to gather signatures. "All those who signed in favor of our campaign are dedicated conservatives who love America and want to see me represent them for this reason," said Singh.

Hirsh Singh has been a Trump supporter since 2015, and while he enjoys massive support from Republican voters in the state, he has faced multiple hurdles from the party elite — including their support for Rikin Mehta, a Washington D.C. lifelong Democrat.

## Rikin Mehta’s long history as a progressive includes extensive high-level work for Obama’s FDA and a 2014 political appointment by the progressive Democrat Mayor of Washington D.C., Muriel Bowser.

Despite Rikin Mehta’s attempt to buy the Republican nomination and his support from New Jersey’s Republican Party elite, Mehta's weak showing clearly demonstrates that Hirsh Singh is the preferred candidate among New Jersey conservatives.

"I am humbled by this outpouring of support from the people, and I’m incredibly proud of my team for maintaining such a high level of integrity and performance," said Singh.
###
---
| For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)

Additional information is available on our [official website](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=952918694d&e=3e017fab0f) and [Facebook](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=c742385475&e=3e017fab0f) page.

Thank you,
**The Singh for Senate Press Team**
_For the People_

name: Brandon, Team Christy
subject: Here's the truth about Christy:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | _The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._
Peter --

We knew that Republicans would play dirty in this race, but now **they've sunk to a new low.**

**Last week:** They launched a nasty attack ad that completely twists Christy's record of working hard and getting support for Californians.

**This week:** The GOP infiltrated and recorded our campaign calls as our team works remotely to help flatten the curve -- all in an attempt to get more material they can use to attack Christy.

**If we're going to win this race, we need to send more mailers, put up more ads, and reach out to as many voters as we can to counteract these dirty tactics.** It won't be easy -- but with your support, we know we can make it happen.

**[Peter, can you help show our strength in numbers by making a grassroots contribution of $5 or more today to make sure we can tell the truth about Christy's record of fighting for California families?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c9/29776869/a0ccca8/569fb5a7/2603537354/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDVfZGlydHl0cmlja3MtczIifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200405_dirtytricks-s2")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c9/29776869/a0ccca8/569fb5a0/2603537354/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDVfZGlydHl0cmlja3MtczIifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200405_dirtytricks-s2&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c9/29776869/a0ccca8/569fb5a1/2603537354/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDVfZGlydHl0cmlja3MtczIifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200405_dirtytricks-s2&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c9/29776869/a0ccca8/569fb5a2/2603537354/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDVfZGlydHl0cmlja3MtczIifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200405_dirtytricks-s2&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c9/29776869/a0ccca8/569fb5a3/2603537354/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDVfZGlydHl0cmlja3MtczIifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200405_dirtytricks-s2&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c9/29776869/a0ccca8/569fb5bc/2603537354/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDVfZGlydHl0cmlja3MtczIifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200405_dirtytricks-s2&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c9/29776869/a0ccca8/569fb5a7/2603537354/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDVfZGlydHl0cmlja3MtczIifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200405_dirtytricks-s2")
When Christy and I found out how low the GOP has sunk, I was outraged. But Christy showed exactly why she's the candidate who will make us proud. She looked at me and said, "They can say whatever they want about me. We're just going to hit back with the truth -- because that's how we win."

And the truth is simple: Christy has a long record of fighting for Californians who've been left behind, who are struggling to pay the bills, who don't have access to health care, whose schools are struggling, and who just need a break.

We have less than six weeks to make sure voters get those facts -- not GOP spin.

**[The GOP is spending nearly $1 million to win this seat. We need your help to fight back. Pitch in $5 -- or whatever you can afford.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c9/29776869/a0ccca8/569fb5a7/2603537354/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDVfZGlydHl0cmlja3MtczIifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200405_dirtytricks-s2")**

Thank you for your help. The GOP thinks they can get away with these dirty tactics -- but with you on our side, we can win.

\-- Brandon

Brandon Zavala
Team Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c9/29776869/a0ccca8/569fb5a7/2603537354/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDVfZGlydHl0cmlja3MtczIifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200405_dirtytricks-s2")

name: Mike Franken
subject: Thank you, crew
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
When I issued last month's financial challenge goal, I was hopeful that supporters would step up, even during this time of personal and financial uncertainty. You did. I am impressed and thankful.
|
---
| |
---

| | Hello crew. When I issued last month's financial challenge goal, I was hopeful that supporters would step up, even during this time of personal and financial uncertainty. You did. I am impressed and thankful. The depth of your support has been incredible. A few short days after we announced our donation match, more than 1,500 of you contributed to our campaign. Yay! We now have the necessary funding to proceed with this stage of the campaign--the sixty-day sprint. These funds are getting put to use straight away so that we can keep up the pressure on Senator Joni Ernst, Mitch McConnell's sidekick, and win big in November. I know times are tough right now, and in that light, I appreciate your dedication and support doubly so. If you're looking for more ways to stay engaged and assure a win in the June primary and the November general election, then [_**join our Facebook group**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f249b/33365068/4a77e6ad/3f8bf130/2943194801/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://www.facebook.com/groups/iowansforfranken/") and [_**follow me on Twitter**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f249b/33365068/4a77e6ad/3f8bf131/2943194801/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://twitter.com/FrankenforIowa"). **Also, you are welcome to join us for our near-nightly virtual town hall discussions, as well. Our next one is particularly exciting, as I'll be joined by JD Scholten, the Democratic candidate in the fourth district._[Click here to RSVP.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f249b/33365068/4a77e6ad/3f8bf132/2943194801/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://www.facebook.com/events/845798575905496/")_** Lastly, send this note and a campaign web site link to your friends, family, and associates. Winning means we have cross-party appeal and that's my personal goal. Thank you, again, and stay safe. We have a great future together. Very respectfully and best wishes, Mike Franken | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f249b/33365068/4a77e6ad/3f8bf133/2943194801/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfmatch03?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200405_thankyou_em_ty_all_btn")
---

---

| Paid for by Franken for Iowa
---

Michael Franken was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

PO Box 3171
Sioux City, IA 51102

| | Friends-

Please join me this Monday at 2:00PM for a Telephone Town Hall with [Senator Marco Rubio, Chairman of the Senate Committee on Small Business & Entrepreneurship](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=135A182A1A2226), to discuss FAQs about the CARES Act and the Paycheck Protection Program.

The Paycheck Protection Program provides small businesses with funds to pay up to 8 weeks of payroll costs, including benefits, interest on mortgages, rent, and utilities.

Monday, April 6 at 2:00PM
Dial-in Number: (855) 756-7520
Access Code: 58885#

_The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in Iowa and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._
Peter,

If you thought that Steve King would stop his usual hyper-partisan, conspiracy theorist antics while we’re in the midst of a global pandemic... well, you might have been a little too optimistic.

Steve King posted a meme alleging that the SEIU was hiding 39 million N95 masks they found and generously donated around the country.

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: key race update (via The Washington Post)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
If we lose in Georgia...
| | |
---
Friend,

I'll be honest with you: I'm in for a tough fight.

**_The_ _Washington Post _just reported that winning here in Georgia is the key to Democrats taking back the Senate - so the GOP is already coming after us. **
My Republican opponent is already spending _millions_ from her own personal fortune to buy this seat - and now a Trump-supporting super PAC has named this race one of its top targets.
Republicans will do _whatever it takes_ to tighten Mitch McConnell's grip on the Senate and ensure that GOP senators can keep rubber-stamping every dangerous policy that comes out of Trump's White House.
If we lose in Georgia, Democrats will have no chance at taking back the Senate and holding corrupt leaders like Mitch McConnell accountable.
**So, friend, I need to ask for your help. The only way I can win in Georgia and help take back the Senate is if we raise another $10,452 before midnight tonight. But right now, we're falling short, and time is running out.**
**With the future of the Senate and the soul of our democracy at stake, I'm counting on your immediate grassroots donation.

[Please, friend, will you rush $5 or more before midnight _tonight_ to flip Georgia blue so we can take back the Senate for Democrats? Every single dollar makes a difference.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk145-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

| This is Mike, Claire's Campaign Manager. We've set an ambitious fundraising goal this quarter, but unfortunately, we're falling behind. We need to raise $5,000 by tonight so we can make our last ad buy before the election.
That's why I've been authorized to activate a DOUBLE MATCH to help get us there. That's right. [When you make your contribution you will make 2X THE IMPACT!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tKUGAjD7T2gcpWrJTsXiqDKnkZwHW7Q2REp2gZ6zv3M4r98vLZVRT6WSC5ZHJIITNnggICGYUzQt65D6ETTvHe08CHK8uoKDJhG7xK4A3OWL9MnSazlAdUj8olDXdwG6Ehvbq9LfXbn6lHac28UoSiP-P6sIFWiKYVyz5EXJND7qThQ_CFAslA==&c=-ooMdIHFr8YFhEAunsqpKwBqLvJ8rQzPaeTfQgRKiabh3bIiIyqY6g==&ch=ao1hpHGejOGrAj-i8RB8zFq0LJuVMw6cHNHjlzRyYRTUdxgRvQyy7w==)
I don't know what will happen if we miss this goal, but I know what could happen. If we fail to take back this district, Nancy Pelosi has nearly a 100% chance of remaining Speaker of the House. If that happens, she will spend the next two years pushing gun control, open borders, and other radical policies.
If our ads go off the air, we will not be able to tell voters about our message of working with President Trump to secure our borders, defend our Second Amendment, and get our economy back on track. We're depending on you: Please donate $10 or more by 11:59 PM tonight to make double the impact, keep our ads up, win back the House, and fire Nancy Pelosi once and for all!

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I’m proud of our decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Hello — As our schools, businesses, and society adapt to the coronavirus, our campaign has been forced to adapt too. My team and I are working from home, and we’ve canceled all in-person events (including fundraisers). It was the right thing to do, and I’m proud of our decision. But just as our fundraising numbers have expectedly dipped, we got word that Mitch McConnell’s shady super PAC funded by right-wing billionaires is booking $67 million in ads targeting Democrats — including me. So, that makes grassroots fundraising more important to winning this Republican-held Senate seat than ever before. In an unprecedented moment like this one, it will take all of us working together to win this campaign. That’s why I’m asking: **If you’re financially able, please make a contribution to our campaign to flip this Senate seat blue. We will not be able to respond to any attacks from McConnell’s super PAC without your support. clean_body: | Hello — As our schools, businesses, and society adapt to the coronavirus, our campaign has been forced to adapt too. My team and I are working from home, and we’ve canceled all in-person events (including fundraisers). It was the right thing to do, and I’m proud of our decision. But just as our fundraising numbers have expectedly dipped, we got word that Mitch McConnell’s shady super PAC funded by right-wing billionaires is booking $67 million in ads targeting Democrats — including me. So, that makes grassroots fundraising more important to winning this Republican-held Senate seat than ever before. In an unprecedented moment like this one, it will take all of us working together to win this campaign. That’s why I’m asking: If you’re financially able, please make a contribution to our campaign to flip this Senate seat blue. We will not be able to respond to any attacks from McConnell’s super PAC without your support. Anything you can contribute today will go a long way to help us fight back and win: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We’re in this together, folks. I’m committed to staying connected with Coloradans through virtual events, phone calls, and messages just like this one. And I’m confident we can keep our momentum up and win this election. Thanks for being with us every step of the way. Stay safe. — John P.S. We know this is a difficult time, so please take care of yourself and your loved ones and only pitch in if you can afford to do so. To pause our emails until this public health emergency has passed, Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado Hickenlooper for Colorado PO Box 18886 Denver, CO 80218 United States

name: Team Green
subject: Fwd: Have you been counted?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/zy1lfGwsDQZMqqaHOHOnePIJJzcP6a0T5pIaqZ9m_q8=/vOXHQDLUFD2WFicXICF1two0NJQM2jSYwNsC9RUk-qo=)
---
| **Team, have you had the chance to complete the 2020 Census yet?[If you haven't, you can do so online -- it'll only take 10 minutes!](https://act.myngp.com/el/zy1lfGwsDQZMqqaHOHOnePIJJzcP6a0T5pIaqZ9m_q8=/fsLALdy_IuudVgK_B64hWstmpnpw8ONHiZibcCkzRfY=)** | **[COMPLETE THE CENSUS ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/zy1lfGwsDQZMqqaHOHOnePIJJzcP6a0T5pIaqZ9m_q8=/chP9x-7zJs6l7XShd_p5D9vtK0_BZRqhM-mIopX0--4=)**
---
Making sure our community is accurately represented in the Census is crucial for making sure we have the resources to thrive over the next decade. Our federal funding for schools, roads, public housing, and more will be determined by how many residents are counted.
**If we 're undercounted, it means we'll miss out on valuable resources for our diverse and growing population.**
The Census doesn't require much to complete. You're not required to pay a dime, submit your social security number, or give your immigration status.
[**Make sure our community is accurately represented by completing the 2020 Census today. You can do so over the phone, by mail, or even online **⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/zy1lfGwsDQZMqqaHOHOnePIJJzcP6a0T5pIaqZ9m_q8=/fsLALdy_IuudVgK_B64hWstmpnpw8ONHiZibcCkzRfY=)
**[COMPLETE THE CENSUS ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/zy1lfGwsDQZMqqaHOHOnePIJJzcP6a0T5pIaqZ9m_q8=/chP9x-7zJs6l7XShd_p5D9vtK0_BZRqhM-mIopX0--4=)**
---
Thanks for doing your civic duty,
\-- Team Green

\----- PREVIOUS MESSAGE -----
Team,
Making sure everyone is counted in the census is absolutely critical -- and here's why:
**The Census determines how federal funding gets allocated for the next 10 years.** That means funding for education, health care, housing, emergency services, and more is at stake. And if all of our residents are not properly counted, we might not receive the resources we need to support our diverse and growing population.
**While you can complete the Census over the phone or by mail, for the first time ever you can also respond online.[Here's the link to make sure you and your household are properly counted.](https://act.myngp.com/el/zy1lfGwsDQZMqqaHOHOnePIJJzcP6a0T5pIaqZ9m_q8=/chP9x-7zJs6l7XShd_p5D9vtK0_BZRqhM-mIopX0--4=)**
**[COMPLETE THE CENSUS ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/zy1lfGwsDQZMqqaHOHOnePIJJzcP6a0T5pIaqZ9m_q8=/chP9x-7zJs6l7XShd_p5D9vtK0_BZRqhM-mIopX0--4=)**
---
There is **no cost** to fill out the Census, and it will **not** ask for your social security number or immigration status. Your personal information is kept confidential and will **not** be shared with law enforcement.
It is critical that every resident and household in our country is properly counted, and the Census is a big part of ensuring necessary resources are allocated fairly.
**So, if you haven 't yet already, [we hope you'll take the 10 minutes to complete the 2020 Census](https://act.myngp.com/el/zy1lfGwsDQZMqqaHOHOnePIJJzcP6a0T5pIaqZ9m_q8=/chP9x-7zJs6l7XShd_p5D9vtK0_BZRqhM-mIopX0--4=) \-- for you, your neighbors, our schools, our roads and so much more.**
Thanks for doing your part,
\-- Team Green
* * *
| | Congressman Al Green has served the people of Texas' 9th district for 15 years. He is a progressive leader in Washington and was the first Member of Congress to introduce articles of impeachment against President Trump on the House floor.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because we want to keep you fully informed about Al's work for justice, accountability, and progress. If you'd prefer not to hear from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/zy1lfGwsDQZMqqaHOHOnePIJJzcP6a0T5pIaqZ9m_q8=/RpV8fsBoB2qN42jI78lkAonScwyGUlrsZ7XxU4LqvWU=) here.
---

| Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
---
Keep Al Green in Congress
P.O. Box 56761
Houston TX 77256-6761 United States

name: BookerforKentucky.com
subject: The challenges we face
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
We want to start this week by being honest with you about the challenges our campaign currently faces.
#
We want to start this week by being honest with you about the challenges our campaign currently faces.
**Let’s cut to the chase with the bad news:** Mitch McConnell’s super PAC is planning on investing _$67 million_ in attack ads to protect his seat and his Senate Republican Majority.
**What makes this worse:** Our online fundraising numbers have been falling these past couple days. We can’t fight back against Mitch’s attack ads without the resources to do so.
**But here’s the good news that keeps us going: People are fired up, more than EVER, about big, progressive change. **It’s never been more clear that Mitch & his Republican colleagues have no interest in helping anyone else but themselves.
Our progressive movement is growing, but it’s not enough if we don’t have the resources to match. **[Will you chip in $5 or anything you can today to help get back on track with our fundraising?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16957588/180668042/957734366?refcode=em20200406&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTBmMzdlNi0zYTc4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2WznuZG-YvPtnjQH7gtOUvhppfPb_rjeL3U4qzvwJyI=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16957589/180668043/957734366?refcode=em20200406&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTBmMzdlNi0zYTc4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2WznuZG-YvPtnjQH7gtOUvhppfPb_rjeL3U4qzvwJyI=)****
There’s a lot of anger out there towards Mitch McConnell and a real hunger for change that only our campaign is speaking to.
**That’s why Charles is our best shot to defeat Mitch.** But if we want him to finish the job it’s critical we raise the resources we need to grow our movement.
If we want to continue our fight for economic justice, access to health care for all, and a fair shot at the American Dream for every family — we can’t afford to fall short on our fundraising.
**In fact, this is the time we should be investing more money into our movement as we get closer to the primary. **
**[So please: will you chip in to help fund this grassroots powered campaign? Even $5 makes a huge difference when we put all of our $5 donations together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16957603/180668057/957734366?refcode=em20200406&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTBmMzdlNi0zYTc4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2WznuZG-YvPtnjQH7gtOUvhppfPb_rjeL3U4qzvwJyI=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16957604/180668058/957734366?refcode=em20200406&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTBmMzdlNi0zYTc4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2WznuZG-YvPtnjQH7gtOUvhppfPb_rjeL3U4qzvwJyI=)****
Thanks,
Team Booker

****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/16957605/180668059/957734366?refcode=em20200406-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTBmMzdlNi0zYTc4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2WznuZG-YvPtnjQH7gtOUvhppfPb_rjeL3U4qzvwJyI=)****

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Help for America's Small Businesses and Their Workers
body:
“We want workers to have work, not to become dependent on the unemployment system.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8eba772fe8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Help for America's Small Businesses and Their Workers**

“We want workers to have work, not to become dependent on the unemployment system,” Labor Secretary Eugene Scalia and Small Business Administrator Jovita Carranza write for Fox Business.

“Small businesses often lack the reserves and access to liquidity that large companies can call upon in hard times. The Paycheck Protection Program”—signed by President Trump on March 27—“addresses this by offering small business loans of up to $10 million . . . Critically, the loans are forgivable if the business retains and continues paying its workers for eight weeks.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f80baf817&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “We have great patriots working across this country who continue to support our food supply chain. From the production of equipment, feed and fertilizer; to the farmer who puts the seed in the ground; to the packers, processors and truckers who bring that food to the market; to the grocers getting that food to consumers, America’s food supply is safe and secure,” Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0bf6f408c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “For decades, Americans have rallied behind their president in time of crisis, so it’s no mystery that President Trump’s approval ratings are up. Except, that is, to anti-Trump obsessives — including much of the media. ‘Who Are the Voters Behind Trump’s Higher Approval Rating?’ a New York Times headline asked last week.” Read more from the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a2028e3b49&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board.
---
|
---
| “Social media has given people at home a small glimpse into the lives of nurses and doctors during this time. Many health care workers have showed the world what they’re doing when they’re not working: They’re praying,” Caitlin O’Kane writes for [CBS News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6f4c8f7fc9&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5b66745e31&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6f88f81725&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=4a6ac7b17a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Tell me: what are you doing to support people in your community?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e785/6cd27893/5463640c/159069c8/4052445517/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | I know this time is a struggle for many of us in many different ways. In addition to trying to stay healthy and avoid the virus, far too many have lost their jobs and are worried about how they'll pay for housing, groceries, prescriptions, and make it through the end of the month. **But many of us are lucky enough to have stable finances, able to keep a roof over our heads and keep food on the table.[ Let's talk briefly about what we can do to support others in our community who might need a hand up in these trying times.](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e785/6cd27893/5463640c/159069c9/4052445517/VEsE/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.facebook.com/JeffMerkleyOregon/posts/3515795081772891")**
* _Support a local charity._ Organizations like the [Oregon Food Bank](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e785/6cd27893/5463640c/159069c6/4052445517/VEsF/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-orfoodbank?refcode=2020-04-05-helping") are providing lifeline services for many families. Our contributions keep their critical missions online.

* _Support workers._ As companies tighten their belts, far, far too many people are finding themselves out of work, or with greatly-diminished hours. I'm talking about house cleaners, gardeners, babysitters, hair stylists--skilled people who are now struggling to get by. If you can afford it, keeping up your regular payments to these workers makes a tremendous difference.

* _Support local businesses._ Local restaurants and artisans have been hit _hard_. As much and as safely as you can, supporting these local businesses might mean the difference between them reopening when this pandemic passes--or not. Consider ordering takeout or buying a gift certificate you'll use in a few weeks or months.

* _Reach out to your neighbors, friends, and family._ The only way to know if someone is doing okay is to _ask_. Keeping an open line of communication during this ordeal is going to be crucial for _all of us_. Especially reach out to people who are doing this alone or whose lives are especially tough--single parents, senior citizens, disabled folks.

Take care of yourself, and then do as much good as you can, for as long as you can, for as many people as you can. Because, at the end of the day, we're all just trying to get through this difficult situation as best we can. **[Join me on Facebook. I'm sure you have other ideas, too. Tell me: what are you doing to support people in your community?](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2e785/6cd27893/5463640c/159069c9/4052445517/VEsC/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.facebook.com/JeffMerkleyOregon/posts/3515795081772891")** **_Jeff_** |
---|---|---

---|---

PO Box 14172, Portland, OR 97293.

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: 2 Virtual Town Halls This Week
body:
Peter,

Keeping our community both informed and unified during this hard time is deeply important to our campaign. That’s why I’m honored to have two extraordinary guests join me for our Virtual Town Halls this week. I hope you received my email about our Virtual Town Hall with Professor Danielle Allen this Tuesday at 6:30pm. You can still click here to join us. https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSelCfKFgwSP63yhfADXIheX-tQSusZAdCnjzoPfP7bt60-Uuw/viewform

Additionally, we’ll be hosting a Virtual Town Hall with Deborah Sale this Thursday at 6:30pm on how healthcare organizations are adapting to this crisis, local healthcare initiatives that are supporting our community and recommendations to better prepare for these crises in the future.

Deborah currently serves on the Board of Public Health Solutions, the largest public health nonprofit serving New York City that provides services directly to vulnerable low-income families while supporting 200 community-based organizations. She was Executive Vice President for External Affairs of the Hospital for Special Surgery, Chief of Staff to New York State Lieutenant Governor Stan Lundine and as such, a senior executive in the administration of Governor Mario Cuomo. Deborah also served in the Carter administration and served on the staff of both the Carter/Mondale and Clinton/Gore campaigns. With extensive experience in both healthcare and government, I know we will all benefit from hearing Deborah’s insights on New York’s COVID-19 response.

Adem Bunkeddeko for Congress Virtual Town Hall

with Deborah Sale

Board Member, Public Health Solutions

Former Executive Vice President for External Affairs of the Hospital for Special Surgery

Former Chief of Staff to New York State Lieutenant Governor Stan Lundine

Thursday, April 9

6:30-7:30PM EST

Zoom conferencing information will be shared with registered participants.

CLICK HERE TO RSVP https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfHFhOdQM5MamA5OFTpvw4O6z87PN6EYyYoveZB0Vkgw36z1Q/viewform

On our RSVP form, we invite you to share the resources that have been most helpful to you and your loved ones during this time. We look forward to reading your responses, sharing resources and building our community’s resilience together. Will you join us? https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfHFhOdQM5MamA5OFTpvw4O6z87PN6EYyYoveZB0Vkgw36z1Q/viewform

Best,
Adem

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Copyright © 2020 Friends of Adem, All rights reserved. You are receiving this email because you have subscribed to emails from Adem for Congress, made a donation to or volunteered for the campaign, or are a friend of Adem Bunkeddeko. |
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Friends of Adem
P.O. Box 130-427
Brooklyn NY 11213-0427 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/PyCjT4AcYgWej8wRMKn05v6G39aBrpSjDpBUdrKJ8J0=/2B9wAl1Xdj03C21U3XRiVEpzVbYXlsyMTJrPjaHpmj8=.

name: John Cornyn
subject: something big is coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Senator John Cornyn
body:
My team is hearing whispers that something big is going on at the Texas Democrat HQ!
I'm not sure what it exactly is, but I can tell you one thing: it's going to cause us a major headache.
While I can't exactly put my finger on it yet, I can tell that Texas has never seen anything like what is coming.
Here's what I can deduce:

* **Budget** : Millions of dollars from around the country are about to pour into Texas
* **Targets** : They'll focus their efforts on President Trump, ME, and every Texas conservative
* **Goal** : They want to smear us, drive us out, and flip Texas blue.

**[By my estimation, all signs point to these attacks launching any day now. We need to be ready. I need you to help build up our defense:](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QDgx6DPzwuEwe5uq4o8NdQpzhoZLA2Ans1wZYoTg_fuKRJq1JQBGgjEzWY-ZNCUZocV14gTTOLkITjoy78u82BsHOSAUn3iwEwuESfuF6ctQcrVra-a-fDicjPS7RxqvDEbFEpXIuMULZO7RixaEWuVmyifsfBmMEBTSXZhX0_tXFK4eunVrs0c8WD-6YsxLIyaI-oAg2pNtbu9t9wr6mAtdKEt5NJdBMA7Cw_7nWh23BJDwp5xkHAdX8OtA4PaAjb0yvZTuSuBQGusHdSP-p_VHxiaNWbzVtyDylA3DFX7Ngqx7-HWB4VoFueScrMUf9ZCyY4vmFupH-cAc_9J9BS6YxGO8FXNfeiexSzTbuMXpmtdSrviYrA==&c=xR52waj-CHeF1ZFEjX2hS9SpsiubuLD6wEnOR1NhJw4KMx_McWWMzw==&ch=VcyZw0T8OfGoN8E7Br7Xe0pzunp9SPGOZS9xUTkAulNDHd9XjXagPQ==)** **RESPONSE DEFENSE FUND** Email: [$SUBSCRIBER.EMAIL](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QDgx6DPzwuEwe5uq4o8NdQpzhoZLA2Ans1wZYoTg_fuKRJq1JQBGgjEzWY-ZNCUZocV14gTTOLkITjoy78u82BsHOSAUn3iwEwuESfuF6ctQcrVra-a-fDicjPS7RxqvDEbFEpXIuMULZO7RixaEWuVmyifsfBmMEBTSXZhX0_tXFK4eunVrs0c8WD-6YsxLIyaI-oAg2pNtbu9t9wr6mAtdKEt5NJdBMA7Cw_7nWh23BJDwp5xkHAdX8OtA4PaAjb0yvZTuSuBQGusHdSP-p_VHxiaNWbzVtyDylA3DFX7Ngqx7-HWB4VoFueScrMUf9ZCyY4vmFupH-cAc_9J9BS6YxGO8FXNfr3wzRvVLNY_6LvPqksYBjg==&c=xR52waj-CHeF1ZFEjX2hS9SpsiubuLD6wEnOR1NhJw4KMx_McWWMzw==&ch=VcyZw0T8OfGoN8E7Br7Xe0pzunp9SPGOZS9xUTkAulNDHd9XjXagPQ==) Needed to Defend Texas: **$65,000** [ **CONTRIBUTE** ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QDgx6DPzwuEwe5uq4o8NdQpzhoZLA2Ans1wZYoTg_fuKRJq1JQBGgjEzWY-ZNCUZocV14gTTOLkITjoy78u82BsHOSAUn3iwEwuESfuF6ctQcrVra-a-fDicjPS7RxqvDEbFEpXIuMULZO7RixaEWuVmyifsfBmMEBTSXZhX0_tXFK4eunVrs0c8WD-6YsxLIyaI-oAg2pNtbu9t9wr6mAtdKEt5NJdBMA7Cw_7nWh23BJDwp5xkHAdX8OtA4PaAjb0yvZTuSuBQGusHdSP-p_VHxiaNWbzVtyDylA3DFX7Ngqx7-HWB4VoFueScrMUf9ZCyY4vmFupH-cAc_9J9BS6YxGO8FXNf9p2aumQlL0Y9VTH75WdB-A==&c=xR52waj-CHeF1ZFEjX2hS9SpsiubuLD6wEnOR1NhJw4KMx_McWWMzw==&ch=VcyZw0T8OfGoN8E7Br7Xe0pzunp9SPGOZS9xUTkAulNDHd9XjXagPQ==) Friend, we are living through a time that will go down in history.
We're bound to see an unprecedented level of liberal spending. The most aggressive they've ever been.
We control how history will remember us.
Will we be remembered as those who were easily beaten, without a fight?
Or will we be remembered as those who fought for our values and NEVER backed down when times got tough?

On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QDgx6DPzwuEwe5uq4o8NdQpzhoZLA2Ans1wZYoTg_fuKRJq1JQBGgh_GrsbZogjUAGZYFD8HbDOsPiEkHeusS81r9VXlxgjYiZBM5foOjoqbRIXusaV2EWi52bCGfMAr1w7geQus2VxMI-PxFHAbIaRplWkwRmUpsKPaeTvlocs=&c=xR52waj-CHeF1ZFEjX2hS9SpsiubuLD6wEnOR1NhJw4KMx_McWWMzw==&ch=VcyZw0T8OfGoN8E7Br7Xe0pzunp9SPGOZS9xUTkAulNDHd9XjXagPQ==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QDgx6DPzwuEwe5uq4o8NdQpzhoZLA2Ans1wZYoTg_fuKRJq1JQBGgjEzWY-ZNCUZHi_yZzXdh2fV8d9OY3x8C0YJbnH_6T8ln4yHN9_u90VKkjiiHkuApyw-c-absZr3iJmozY6wbGbJMyLOHA6elDvQG52qtfiO&c=xR52waj-CHeF1ZFEjX2hS9SpsiubuLD6wEnOR1NhJw4KMx_McWWMzw==&ch=VcyZw0T8OfGoN8E7Br7Xe0pzunp9SPGOZS9xUTkAulNDHd9XjXagPQ==) \- that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QDgx6DPzwuEwe5uq4o8NdQpzhoZLA2Ans1wZYoTg_fuKRJq1JQBGgh_GrsbZogjUk8yJJgqWtkqc70KExYP5uAVqC6NCi9TihlQT0tGj06mAg4XfAiBjER3rbr-_DsAD9ERxKk8UQMWPRGdCuQshulTwrMW3tCWQTvK5dGVbpjbzmTWzDWm3cg==&c=xR52waj-CHeF1ZFEjX2hS9SpsiubuLD6wEnOR1NhJw4KMx_McWWMzw==&ch=VcyZw0T8OfGoN8E7Br7Xe0pzunp9SPGOZS9xUTkAulNDHd9XjXagPQ==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QDgx6DPzwuEwe5uq4o8NdQpzhoZLA2Ans1wZYoTg_fuKRJq1JQBGgg5OUMpmgMFNRrB21kOqiJkRZ6yNCxxpGM4gZG6km4THaWPDkinLJVy7UbrW-YaNfa24u1a9xlKIVBEUAUTgToyT1jcayPOPUvXh04kTMsdDBBo64BYqzZV0nhZlWEmD7WJlocUSGMNQa7uv9EHaDN2UCSip2RZMxaGLAsDqEQ-JSUN4OWmuBk_cPMwiVHT935fUZvFU27rdK1x6D0_skPEkpMVcHTOEUmIJYNEmKI8UnC2k6_UZMYhi1chCsrOuWw==&c=xR52waj-CHeF1ZFEjX2hS9SpsiubuLD6wEnOR1NhJw4KMx_McWWMzw==&ch=VcyZw0T8OfGoN8E7Br7Xe0pzunp9SPGOZS9xUTkAulNDHd9XjXagPQ==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. name: Melissa Hortman
subject: The state of our state
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/djcY4Wf72dy2rJRD0ow7ZRMFb8HFkM6BwqMtuioCs0g=/Xuq86oCdYN5r0sLBekZvN_asTYca6gLwD6IwbHHYrvY=?refcode=040620)
| | Friend, Last night, Governor Walz delivered his State of the State address-- like most things happening right now--from his home. These are strange and unprecedented times and the Governor's words were needed now more than ever. Like most of you, I have not been able to see my adult children in person in some time due to social distancing, and I miss them. The silver lining is that this crisis is bringing us together in new ways. For instance, I was able to video chat for the first time with my son who lives in another state. At our core, Minnesotans care for one another. I want to send my sincere appreciation to the folks working on the frontlines of this crisis: health care professionals, grocery store workers, delivery drivers, and every other essential worker keeping our state moving while our lives grind to a stop. Governor Walz has shown incredible leadership through this crisis. The Minnesota House will continue working with him and doing everything we can to help Minnesotans during this difficult time. Despite the challenges and uncertainty before us, we remain confident in our ability to come together and pull through. Like Governor Walz said last night, "The State of our State is united." Thank you, **Melissa Hortman** Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives _P.S. If you have not had a chance to watch the Governor 's speech yet, you can view it _[_here_](https://act.myngp.com/el/djcY4Wf72dy2rJRD0ow7ZRMFb8HFkM6BwqMtuioCs0g=/xtoEagjLZgoVdKHPFY4BnJX3csG260yCP623MoHP1CQ=?v=CtqAZP5wzI0) _._ [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/djcY4Wf72dy2rJRD0ow7ZRMFb8HFkM6BwqMtuioCs0g=/Xuq86oCdYN5r0sLBekZvN_asTYca6gLwD6IwbHHYrvY=?refcode=040620)

name: Congressman Drew Ferguson
subject: They are at it again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Drew Ferguson For Congress
body:
As our nation battles a public health crisis, Democrats play political games. We should be coming together as a nation to find a resolution to the unprecedented ramifications of the coronavirus.
Friend,

As our nation battles a public health crisis, Democrats play political games.

Nancy Pelosi announced that House Democrats will create a new politically motivated House committee to investigate the Trump Administration's response to the COVID-19 crisis.

This is just the latest example showing how out of touch Democrats are with the rest of the nation.

From the Russia hoax to impeachment, the Democrats' number one objective has always been to overturn the results of the 2016 election and remove Trump from office.

While Democrats were focused on the impeachment trial above all else, the Trump Administration was leading the way to combat COVID-19.

We should be coming together as a nation to find a resolution to the unprecedented ramifications of the coronavirus.

Instead, Democrats' top priority of defeating Trump remains unchanged during this public health crisis.

We need to show leadership to navigate us through these unsettling times.

[**Join me and House Conservatives to stand with President Trump to lead us to victory over COVID-19.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JbCNY0-7xzM1gtMHWcGwCZGfbvMQDmDlh3eZRx0aysuNwDGj4KVFEGn51H8ySYg-jfLw6TL488fMs5RU8EL_1iuhuXVVm6OVwI9jMArMmsANr8W97WfnYPR1n8e7DL1OIaIHzdiRTsB81kTrCcPlM628pksuesc8wG6ModIhPpU0uPDsBzUmClwFS8d0PZSv5LaQCpSm5djdbCJqOsZt9wwav1p8NRi3HvoCXQmeDo8t5Q2tPBmNXRZzUb3QZAMtjd-jgNiWodXTLUFI6Ra8cDelQ-eTf1I60mpQmuwW6HwM16O4WLd7ZPXwnUpv_oDCV0dKZB6FqgSUBELSrLvEfT1ACTdjgts2nSlSaH90jffDoLIsi7rocKfnXGXxZPcvIB0nPWsY0CiCWwxyUaO6fQ==&c=AiQbo2Y7g-u9q72xIz9pdkTIMd41_dATMZvl-EpaJndp4l78dvLkCA==&ch=kjkoy08-nreNH56XcfDkHLciZ6qogZh2nnbzoefYUuMnovIZWJ9h0A==)

name: Our Revolution
subject: How we can get a progressive platform and keep critical nomination reforms
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| Forces inside the Democratic Party that oppose a progressive policy platform and a fair nomination process would love to see Bernie Sanders drop out of the presidential race.

**Here 's why:** if delegates at this year's convention fail to continue the reforms that we won in 2016, we could be back to business as usual -- on superdelegates, caucus and primary voting rules, party registration, and much more.

If Bernie remains in the race, he will undoubtedly be over the 25% threshold necessary to get enough members on the Rules and Platform Committees who can fight for our vision of a progressive party.

**These reforms, and our movement 's progressive platform (Medicare for All, for example, has won in every state so far), are very popular. If Bernie stays in, then even if Biden is the nominee, we have a much better chance to fight for a more progressive Democratic platform and preserve vital reforms in the party's nominating process.**

[**_We need to know what you think! Do you think that Bernie Sanders should remain in the Democratic presidential primary race to fight for progressive reform, or do you believe that it is time to unite behind Joe Biden? Let us know here._**](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/let-bernie-know-where-you-stand?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=1+-+We+need+to+know+what+you+think+Do+you+th&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_365DO_200405_2_1&source=OR_EM_SV_365DO_200405_2_1")

The corporate media and many Democratic Party leaders are fine with the nominating process being a coronation, and consider the party merely a platform for fundraising.

Many pundits view the Democratic Party as a vehicle for individual candidates seeking a political career. **But in a real democracy, political parties are a place for real debates on the issues to hold candidates and elected officials accountable to the needs of the people.**

This is why our movement must continue to move forward with reforming the Democratic Party from the bottom up. Bernie is being pressured from all directions to drop out -- we need to let him know that we have his back if he decides to keep fighting in this race.

[**_Do you think that Bernie Sanders should remain in the Democratic presidential primary race to fight for progressive reform? Or do you think it is time to unite behind Joe Biden? Let us know here._**](https://go.ourrevolution.%3D%3D/?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/let-bernie-know-where-you-stand?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=2+-+Do+you+think+that+Bernie+Sanders+should+&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SV_365DO_200405_2_1&source=OR_EM_SV_365DO_200405_2_1")

What's at stake here is not just the 2020 Democratic presidential nomination. We're fighting to build a progressive Democratic Party and elect the next wave of candidates who will turn our platform into policy -- in 2020 and beyond. That's why it's so important that we discuss this right now.

We're all in this together,

Larry Cohen
Board Chair
Our Revolution

---

name: Senate Battleground 2020 (via Voter Protection Project)
subject: Top elections forecaster: Susan Collins "is in for a very close race"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Win in Maine, flip the Senate, ditch Mitch, save America. **This is HUGE, Peter: Top election forecasters at _Sabato 's Crystal Ball_ have UPGRADED our chances of defeating Susan Collins.** [](https://go.protectvoting.%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_collins_april2020?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200406_CrystalBallMaine_U2_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200406_CrystalBallMaine_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200406_CrystalBallMaine_U2_X2") We've said it before, and we'll say it again: If Democrats have the resources to tell every Maine voter the TRUTH about Collins' record -- from cutting pandemic funding to Kavanaugh -- we'll flip this seat AND control of the Senate. [**To keep up the momentum and stay on track to win in Maine, we need another 500 grassroots donations to the Senate Battleground Fund before MIDNIGHT. Chip in $5 or any amount to FINALLY defeat Susan Collins and flip the Senate ->**](https://go.protectvoting.%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_collins_april2020?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200406_CrystalBallMaine_U2_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+To+keep+up+the+momentum+and+stay+on+trac&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200406_CrystalBallMaine_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200406_CrystalBallMaine_U2_X2") | | | [DEFEAT COLLINS](https://go.protectvoting.%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_collins_april2020?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200406_CrystalBallMaine_U2_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+DEFEAT+COLLINS&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200406_CrystalBallMaine_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200406_CrystalBallMaine_U2_X2")
---

_Sabato 's Crystal Ball_ is one of the top election forecasters in the country. Here's what they just said about Maine:

**"We are also moving Sen. Susan Collins (R-ME) from Leans Republican to Toss-up. We've resisted this change for a while, but it's become apparent to us that Collins is in for a very close race..."**

Susan Collins has practiced her "fake moderate" act for years, but it's not working anymore. Voters are asking: If you're "concerned" about Trump, why do you vote for his agenda at every turn?

**National Republicans know that Collins is in trouble -- that 's why Mitch McConnell's super PAC just invested $7.2 MILLION in TV ads to prop her up!**

[**If we fall short, the GOP super PAC attack ads will drown out the TRUTH about Susan Collins ' voting record. We can't let that happen -- chip in toward our 500-donation goal before midnight so we can finally defeat Collins, flip the Senate, and take away Mitch McConnell's power!**](https://go.protectvoting.%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_collins_april2020?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200406_CrystalBallMaine_U2_X2&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+If+we+fall+short+the+GOP+super+PAC+attac&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200406_CrystalBallMaine_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200406_CrystalBallMaine_U2_X2")

"" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thank you -- please stay safe and support each other, \-- the Voter Protection Project P.S. Wisconsin will be holding a critical election TOMORROW, Tuesday, April 7. "" | "" | | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. If you'd like to support the Voter Protection Project, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, ""

name: Kunal, Team Christy
subject: Republicans are spending more and more money 💰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | _The number one priority during this time is to make sure everyone helps mitigate the spread of COVID-19 in California and across the country. Our campaign is doing our part by canceling all in-person events, moving to a digital operation, and supporting local efforts to help those in need. Emails like this are a critical part of our ability to run a strong campaign that can win._
Peter,

We let you know a few days ago that the National Republican Congressional Committee announced they would be spending over $600,000 on television ads for Mike Garcia.

**Well -- they just bumped up the amount they're going to spend to nearly $1 million.**

**[Rush a donation right now to help us fight back>>](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c6/29776869/a0ebf0f/569fb613/3391676586/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfbnJjY2J1bXAtbm8ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_nrccbump-no")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c6/29776869/a0ebf0f/569fb6ec/3391676586/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfbnJjY2J1bXAtbm8ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_nrccbump-no&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c6/29776869/a0ebf0f/569fb6ed/3391676586/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfbnJjY2J1bXAtbm8ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_nrccbump-no&express_lane=true&amount=25")

[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c6/29776869/a0ebf0f/569fb6ee/3391676586/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfbnJjY2J1bXAtbm8ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_nrccbump-no&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c6/29776869/a0ebf0f/569fb6ef/3391676586/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfbnJjY2J1bXAtbm8ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_nrccbump-no&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c6/29776869/a0ebf0f/569fb6e8/3391676586/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfbnJjY2J1bXAtbm8ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_nrccbump-no&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c6/29776869/a0ebf0f/569fb613/3391676586/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfbnJjY2J1bXAtbm8ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_nrccbump-no")
This race matters to the Republicans -- they are desperate to flip a seat from blue to red, especially in California.

But this race matters to us more -- because so much is at stake if Mike Garcia is elected. He will be a blank check, a promised vote for everything the president asks for. Access to health care, reproductive rights, campaign finance reform, and so much more is dependent on this race.

**So much is on the line for people in California's 25th -- and that's why we're giving everything we've got to win this race.**

**[But truth be told -- we really need you to step up now to help defeat Mike Garcia. Pitching in $5 or whatever you can will show not only that we have your support and trust, but it will show the district and the country the number of grassroots supporters we have on our side.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8c6/29776869/a0ebf0f/569fb613/3391676586/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MDZfbnJjY2J1bXAtbm8ifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200406_nrccbump-no")**

Thank you so much. We need each other now more than ever to get the job done.

\-- Kunal

Kunal Atit
Deputy Campaign Manager and Communications Director

name: Taylor (Team Young)
subject: Sprinting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
We have to hit the ground running, %%First Name%%. We're in an all-out sprint until November.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016SxwJX4NSlP98chGOKwEKv-zimYuQsZAL32nueqjCszCCxjc6Rl1fvEB73KC5ffFCMRIRNdmE6u7H1befq6-4tq7fyrUcWMfLjyHL-9vABn0XT_tY2WQbFt8rephSndNb4cF4NPUY_lMAE__IbAyTTV33qaqnecQBbkqTdpSw_36Jtz5N5RqlRCFxaqt2-UgxtoiWAYyygHK72p9CYApsINtDRQ_2fhD3w6FyAkizZdpt19_DqFuFWS1ARCAvJygDLmU5fymShI2C4WBKw9LxrTsAQr4_dCg25HlDIyF99OhteV09R0sKOXIT3TAO8iANqJbo7FY0DuYTAgVuW6zrirfjHeXikmDiJcB2dRLBE--Z64Ls6Ct_A==&c=53T_100Ua_1twlaSuySBfJTwut1R0n2PDzI56jfz9TUfrrY6_vv1fw==&ch=CCsTxtVrPktldkK10I6wbDOrxqNGQrcrja8GNm5RVKm1ztB3p8On-A==) We have to hit the ground running, Friend. We're in an all-out sprint until November.

[**Can you chip in $5 right now to help us start this month strong and keep our momentum building?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016SxwJX4NSlP98chGOKwEKv-zimYuQsZAL32nueqjCszCCxjc6Rl1fvEB73KC5ffFCMRIRNdmE6u7H1befq6-4tq7fyrUcWMfLjyHL-9vABn0XT_tY2WQbFt8rephSndNb4cF4NPUY_lMAE__IbAyTTV33qaqnecQBbkqTdpSw_36Jtz5N5RqlRCFxaqt2-UgxtoiWAYyygHK72p9CYApsINtDRQ_2fhD3w6FyAkizZdpt19_DqFuFWS1ARCAvJygDLmU5fymShI2C4WBKw9LxrTsAQr4_dCg25HlDIyF99OhteV09R0sKOXIT3TAO8iANqJbo7FY0DuYTAgVuW6zrirfjHeXikmDiJcB2dRLBE--Z64Ls6Ct_A==&c=53T_100Ua_1twlaSuySBfJTwut1R0n2PDzI56jfz9TUfrrY6_vv1fw==&ch=CCsTxtVrPktldkK10I6wbDOrxqNGQrcrja8GNm5RVKm1ztB3p8On-A==)

We are facing an uphill battle and we are going to need all hands on deck because the groundwork we lay now will play a large part in determining our chances of winning in November.

This is one of just a handful of races that will determine who controls the House Majority. That's why your support is so important.

[**So we 're asking, if you're able, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to support proud conservative and immigrant woman Young Kim? **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016SxwJX4NSlP98chGOKwEKv-zimYuQsZAL32nueqjCszCCxjc6Rl1fvEB73KC5ffFCMRIRNdmE6u7H1befq6-4tq7fyrUcWMfLjyHL-9vABn0XT_tY2WQbFt8rephSndNb4cF4NPUY_lMAE__IbAyTTV33qaqnecQBbkqTdpSw_36Jtz5N5RqlRCFxaqt2-UgxtoiWAYyygHK72p9CYApsINtDRQ_2fhD3w6FyAkizZdpt19_DqFuFWS1ARCAvJygDLmU5fymShI2C4WBKw9LxrTsAQr4_dCg25HlDIyF99OhteV09R0sKOXIT3TAO8iANqJbo7FY0DuYTAgVuW6zrirfjHeXikmDiJcB2dRLBE--Z64Ls6Ct_A==&c=53T_100Ua_1twlaSuySBfJTwut1R0n2PDzI56jfz9TUfrrY6_vv1fw==&ch=CCsTxtVrPktldkK10I6wbDOrxqNGQrcrja8GNm5RVKm1ztB3p8On-A==)

With your help, we can accomplish anything. [**Can we count on you to help us start April on the right foot?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016SxwJX4NSlP98chGOKwEKv-zimYuQsZAL32nueqjCszCCxjc6Rl1fvEB73KC5ffFCMRIRNdmE6u7H1befq6-4tq7fyrUcWMfLjyHL-9vABn0XT_tY2WQbFt8rephSndNb4cF4NPUY_lMAE__IbAyTTV33qaqnecQBbkqTdpSw_36Jtz5N5RqlRCFxaqt2-UgxtoiWAYyygHK72p9CYApsINtDRQ_2fhD3w6FyAkizZdpt19_DqFuFWS1ARCAvJygDLmU5fymShI2C4WBKw9LxrTsAQr4_dCg25HlDIyF99OhteV09R0sKOXIT3TAO8iANqJbo7FY0DuYTAgVuW6zrirfjHeXikmDiJcB2dRLBE--Z64Ls6Ct_A==&c=53T_100Ua_1twlaSuySBfJTwut1R0n2PDzI56jfz9TUfrrY6_vv1fw==&ch=CCsTxtVrPktldkK10I6wbDOrxqNGQrcrja8GNm5RVKm1ztB3p8On-A==)

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Weathering the Storm Together
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501143583%2501100441%2b-%2b04-06-2020%2beNewsletter%250115451.15422371.4523892.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501143583%2501100441%2b-%2b04-06-2020%2beNewsletter%250115451.15422371.4523892.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **April 6, 2020** |
---|---|---|---
| | | Marylanders have always come together in the face of adversity. COVID-19 is putting that spirit to the test, but we must stay united in our resolve to combat this virus and the economic crisis it has created. I've been coordinating and checking in with folks around our state since the beginning of the COVID-19 crisis - health care workers, community leaders, small business owners, non-profit organizations, educators, elected officials, parents, seniors, and others.

Your questions have been straightforward: How do we keep our families and employees safe and healthy through the coronavirus crisis? How do we pay the bills? When will it end?

While experts share a range of projections for when the coronavirus will peak in Maryland, we must continue to stay safe by practicing social distancing, washing our hands, and following the instructions of our state and local authorities and the CDC. It's important to stay healthy, get exercise, and contact your health care provider if you think you may be ill.

If you or people you know do not have health insurance, please encourage them to [**sign up now** at MarylandHealthConnection.gov](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=MarylandHealthConnection.gov&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.marylandhealthconnection.gov%2f&redir_log=621354806748293 "MarylandHealthConnection.gov") before the emergency special enrollment period ends. See below for more state resources, including food assistance and help finding child care for essential workers.

As Marylanders do their part, Congress is acting to support the nationwide pandemic response. To learn what's in Congress's first two COVID-19 response and relief bills, [click here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fimo%2fmedia%2fdoc%2fVan%2520Hollen%2520Fact%2520Sheet%2520--%2520Phase%25201%2520and%25202%2520Coronavirus%2520Response%2520Bills%2520FINAL%2520FOR%2520WEB%5b1%5d.pdf&redir_log=662206328671002).

Congress has also acted to help Marylanders pay their bills, support workers who have lost their jobs, and help hard hit businesses and other employers weather this storm. To learn about our most recent bill, including full information on new assistance for small and medium businesses and non-profits, and expanded unemployment payments for workers and families, [click here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=Coronavirus+Phase+3+bill+summary+&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fimo%2fmedia%2fdoc%2fVan%2520Hollen%2520Fact%2520Sheet%2520--%2520CARES%2520Coronavirus%2520Bill%2520as%2520of%25204-3.pdf&redir_log=685250582881799 "Coronavirus Phase 3 bill summary "). Or see a summary of federal actions and links to state resources below. Now that Congress has provided these funds, I'm working every day to ensure that federal agencies are getting them out to Marylanders as quickly as possible.

#
Chris Van Hollen
* **New unemployment insurance benefits and how to get them** : More workers now qualify for unemployment insurance, including self-employed and gig economy workers. Regular unemployment benefits in Maryland range from $50 to $430 per week, and the legislation increases everyone's benefit by $600 per week through July 31. Additionally, workers can claim up to 39 weeks of unemployment benefits - a 13-week increase. **[Click here to apply](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=Maryland+Unemployment+Application&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.dllr.state.md.us%2femployment%2funemployment.shtml&redir_log=945570618094417 "Maryland Unemployment Application")**.

* Full funding is also provided for Maryland's "work sharing" program, and workers covered by this program as a result of having their hours cut by their employer will also be eligible for the $600 boost in weekly unemployment benefits.

* **New paid sick leave benefits and who gets them** : Most Marylanders who work full-time for businesses with fewer than 500 employees, as well as government employees, get two weeks paid sick leave at full pay (up to $511/day) for coronavirus-related reasons, or two weeks at two-thirds pay (up to $200/day) to care for someone else affected by coronavirus. In addition, most Marylanders at businesses with fewer than 500 employees get up to 12 weeks of leave at two-thirds pay (up to $200/day) to care for children whose schools or daycares are closed due to coronavirus.

* **Refundable tax credit** : Employers get a refundable tax credit to fully cover the cost of paying sick leave wages and health benefits paid under this bill. Self-employed workers can also claim this credit.

* **Direct cash payments** : Each adult gets $1,200 ($2,400 for couples), and families get $500 for each child. The amount begins to be reduced for people whose adjusted gross income was above $75,000 ($150,000 for couples). You can use [this tool](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=Coronavirus+Payment+Calculator&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.washingtonpost.com%2fgraphics%2fbusiness%2fcoronavirus-stimulus-check-calculator%2f&redir_log=17912070487621 "Coronavirus Payment Calculator") to calculate your direct payment. An automatic payment will be sent to households that filed a tax return for 2018 or 2019, and recipients of Social Security or Railroad Retirement benefits - others can claim their payment by filing a tax return.

* **Keeping people in their homes** : Federally-backed mortgages, including those guaranteed or insured by the Department of Veterans Affairs, are protected from foreclosure for 60 days beginning on March 18, 2020. Additionally, borrowers should be able to suspend or reduce payments for up to six months without penalties or late fees, and the lender cannot report the loan as late. Foreclosure or eviction proceedings against renters and homeowners cannot start until at least May 17 if the landlord has a government-backed mortgage.

* **Student loan relief** : Payments and interest accrual on federal student loans are suspended through September 30, as are collections on overdue loans. Loans for any semester interrupted by the virus are forgiven, and those loans and Pell grants don't count against a student's limit. Schools can continue to pay work-study students who can't work and make other emergency grants to cover students' virus-related expenses.

* **Personal tax breaks** : Withdrawals of up to $100,000 from retirement accounts without the normal 10% penalty are allowed this year for hardships related to COVID-19. A $300 charitable giving deduction without itemizing deductions is available for 2020. For those whose employers help repay their student loans, up to $5,250 of this assistance is tax-free for you in 2020. And separately from the CARES Act, state and federal income tax filing and payment deadlines have been [postponed](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=Federal+and+Maryland+income+tax+due+dates&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.marylandtaxes.gov%2fmedia%2f2020%2fDue_Dates_Website_Cover.pdf&redir_log=253129983629469 "Federal and Maryland income tax due dates").

* **Homelessness** : Increases funding that states can use to assist families, veterans, and others experiencing homelessness.

* **Protect jobs at large employers** : To preserve jobs at large companies, some federal assistance is necessary. While this assistance should have come with greater protections for workers, Senate Democrats fought for oversight provisions that will help prevent these taxpayer funds from being abused.

###
_You can find more information on these programs and how to apply on the pages listed in_[ _Senator Van Hollen 's Small and Medium Business Owner and Non-profit Guide to CARES Act._](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2fimo%2fmedia%2fdoc%2fVan%2520Hollen%2520Small%2c%2520Medium%2520Business%2520Owner%2c%2520Non-profit%2520Guide%2520to%2520CARES%2520Act%2520as%2520of%25204-3%5b5%5d.pdf&redir_log=271213221631000)
* **Paycheck Protection Program** (PPP): Zero-fee forgivable Small Business Administration (SBA) loans of up to $10 million, at 1% interest, to keep workers on payroll and pay fixed costs such as rent. (p. 2)

***The application window for PPP opened Friday, April 3 (April 10 for independent contractors and sole proprietors), and funds are limited. We encourage you to apply quickly through any qualified lender. [Click here to learn more](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=SBA+Paycheck+Protection+Program+information&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.sba.gov%2ffunding-programs%2floans%2fcoronavirus-relief-options%2fpaycheck-protection-program-ppp&redir_log=306107002956721 "SBA Paycheck Protection Program information").

* **SBA Debt Relief** : Existing and new SBA borrowers get all loan payments covered, including principal, interest, and fees, for six months, except for PPP loans. (p. 6)

* **Emergency Grants and Disaster Loans** : A $10,000 grant can be provided to SBA disaster loan applicants. The full loan can go up to $2 million. (p. 7)

* **Employee retention tax credit** : Business tax credit worth up to $5,000 per employee for salary and health benefits paid by the hardest-hit firms. (p. 11)

* **Payroll tax deferral** : Half of 2020 payroll taxes can be deferred through the end of 2021, and half until the end of 2022. (p. 11)

* **Eligible businesses** : Small and medium businesses currently eligible for SBA programs, as well as other businesses and charitable nonprofit organizations with 500 or fewer employees. Businesses in certain industries, including hospitality, are included if they have 500 or fewer employees per location.

_**Small business owners can also benefit from these provisions:**_

* **Other tax deductions** : Increased business loss and interest deductions. Fixed "retail glitch" for restaurants and retail businesses.

* **Reimbursement for employee sick leave** : Employee sick leave was covered through refundable tax credits in the Phase 2 bill. CARES provides those credits faster.

#### _Non-profit organizations can benefit from these provisions:_
* Eligible for the above-mentioned Paycheck Protection Program, SBA emergency grant, employee retention credit, and payroll tax deferral programs.

* **Loans** : An additional Treasury loan facility for non-profits of any size (not limited to 500 employees).

* **Disaster relief** : A $45 billion Disaster Relief Fund for organizations providing critical and essential services.

* **Deduction for donors** : A special above-the-line charitable giving deduction for 2020 should also boost donations.

###
* **No evictions** : The state has ordered that no Maryland family or business who suffered a substantial loss of income due to COVID-19 or related closures can be evicted during the coronavirus state of emergency. The obligation to make rent and mortgage payments remains. Landlords may continue to file failure to pay rent cases, which will be considered after the state of emergency ends.

* **No repossessions** : Marylanders' cars, mobile homes, trailers, and house boats cannot be repossessed during the coronavirus emergency. The obligation to make rent and mortgage payments remains. Landlords may continue to file failure to pay rent cases, which will be considered after the state of emergency ends.

* **Senior citizens** seeking information and resources on COVID-19 can [click here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=State+of+Maryland+information+for+seniors&redirect=https%3a%2f%2faging.maryland.gov%2fPages%2fNovel-coronavirus.aspx&redir_log=385359970431391 "State of Maryland information for seniors").

* To find **school meals** nearby, visit the Maryland State Department of Education's [meals site](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=State+of+Maryland+school+meals+finder&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmars.msde.maryland.gov%2fmars_sitesearch%2f&redir_log=648767416991333 "State of Maryland school meals finder").

* To find **child care** , call Maryland's LOCATE referral system at 1-877-261-0060, or [click here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=Maryland+child+care+information&redirect=http%3a%2f%2fwww.marylandfamilynetwork.org%2fprograms-services%2flocate%2f&redir_log=074088812453442 "Maryland child care information").

* For help paying **utility bills** , visit Maryland's [Office of Home Energy Programs](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=State+of+Maryland+home+energy+assistance&redirect=http%3a%2f%2fdhr.maryland.gov%2foffice-of-home-energy-programs%2fhow-do-you-apply%2f&redir_log=584818711733502 "State of Maryland home energy assistance").

* For **temporary cash assistance** to families with dependent children, [click here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=State+of+Maryland+cash+assistance+information&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmydhrbenefits.dhr.state.md.us%2fdashboardClient%2f%23%2fhome&redir_log=540010106459415 "State of Maryland cash assistance information").

* For **state small business help** (separate from the Federal programs listed above), [click here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=State+of+Maryland+small+business+assistance+information&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fcommerce.maryland.gov%2ffund%2fmaryland-small-business-covid-19-emergency-relief-fund-programs&redir_log=548180129753687 "State of Maryland small business assistance information").

---
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15451.15422371.4523892.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
